tool_args.label: East End Gateway / LIRR Concourse at Penn Station
tool_args.raw_text: This is MTA Construction & Development's first report to the Capital Oversight Program Committee on the East End Gateway and LIRR Concourse Project. This project is delivered via a development agreement with Penn District Station Developer LLC. (Vornado Realty Trust) and the Design Builder Skanska Penn Station Constructors. Phase I, the new East End Gateway, includes a dramatic new entrance with views of the Empire State Building. Located at 33rd Street and 7th Avenue, the entrance has three escalators and a stairway. Phase II, the LIRR Concourse project, is widening LIRR's main concourse under 33rd Street from 30 to 57 feet and raising the ceiling height to 18 feet.

payload.project_name: East End Gateway / LIRR Concourse at Penn Station
payload.status: Phase I completed; Phase II 40% complete
payload.description: Two-phase project at Penn Station: Phase I new East End Gateway entrance at 33rd Street and 7th Avenue with three escalators and stairway; Phase II widening LIRR concourse under 33rd Street from 30 to 57 feet and raising ceiling to 18 feet

evidence_refs.source_quote: first report to the Capital Oversight Program Committee on the East End Gateway and LIRR Concourse Project
Phase I, the new East End Gateway, includes a dramatic new entrance with views of the Empire State Building. Located at 33rd Street and 7th Avenue, the entrance has three escalators and a stairway.
Phase II, the LIRR Concourse project, is widening LIRR's main concourse under 33rd Street from 30 to 57 feet and raising the ceiling height to 18 feet.

Phase I completed with the opening of the new entrance at the end of 2020. It is currently in the Closeout Phase. Phase II is currently 40% complete with Substantial Completion forecasted for March 2023.

tool_args.label: East Side Access
tool_args.raw_text: East Side Access will provide LIRR passengers with direct service to Grand Central Terminal. Project involves building out an 11.5 mile underground tunnel with a new station and concourse below the existing Grand Central Terminal. Budget $11.1B. Substantial Completion Dec 2022. Project is approximately 89% complete.

payload.description: Provides LIRR passengers with direct service to Grand Central Terminal via 11.5 mile underground tunnel with new 8-track terminal and concourse below Grand Central Terminal

evidence_refs.source_quote: East Side Access will provide LIRR passengers with direct service to Grand Central Terminal.
Substantial Completion Dec 2022 Dec 2022 Budget $11.1B
Project is currently approximately 89% overall complete against a planned completion of 94% with a public Revenue Service Date of December 13, 2022.

tool_args.label: LIRR Main Line Expansion (Third Track)
tool_args.raw_text: This project will add a 10-mile-long third track on the LIRR Main Line to reduce train congestion and enable bi-directional service during peak hours. LIRR Expansion also includes several related projects, including the elimination of eight street level grade crossings, improvements to rail bridges, reconstruction of five stations, and new parking garages. Budget $2,588M. Substantial Completion April 2023.

payload.description: Adds 10-mile third track on the LIRR Main Line between Floral Park and Hicksville; includes elimination of 8 grade crossings, bridge improvements, 5 station reconstructions, and new parking garages

evidence_refs.source_quote: add a 10-mile-long third track on the LIRR Main Line to reduce train congestion and enable bi-directional service during peak hours
Substantial Completion April 2023 April 2023 Budget $2,588 M $2,588 M The design/build portion of the project is approximately 80% complete
project is on schedule to reach substantial completion in Q2 2023 and is still on track to put the third track into service in Q4 2022
all 8 grade crossings along the Main Line have now been permanently eliminated

tool_args.label: East End Gateway / LIRR Concourse at Penn Station

Phase I, the new East End Gateway, includes a dramatic new entrance with views of the Empire State Building. Located at 33 rd Street and 7 th Avenue, the entrance has three escalators and a stairway. Phase II, the LIRR Concourse project, is widening LIRR's main concourse under 33 rd Street from 30 to 57 feet and raising the ceiling height to 18 feet.

payload.description: Two-phase project at Penn Station: Phase I new East End Gateway entrance at 33rd Street and 7th Avenue (completed December 2020); Phase II widening LIRR concourse under 33rd Street from 30 to 57 feet and raising ceiling to 18 feet. Phase I, the new East End Gateway, includes a dramatic new entrance with views of the Empire State Building. Located at 33 rd Street and 7 th Avenue, the entrance has three escalators and a stairway.
Phase II, the LIRR Concourse project, is widening LIRR’s main concourse under 33 rd Street from 30 to 57 feet and raising the ceiling height to 18 feet.

Phase I completed with the opening of the new entrance at the end of 2020. It is currently in the Closeout Phase. Phase II is currently 40% complete with Substantial Completion forecasted for March 2023.

tool_args.label: CBTC Queens Boulevard West - Phase 1
tool_args.raw_text: Queens Boulevard West (80% complete; $729M forecast). tool_args.label: IEC concern over CBTC interoperability specifications
tool_args.raw_text: the IEC remains concerned that the contractually required CBTC Interface and Interoperability Specifications have not yet been fully validated, particularly with respect to operation of Thales-equipped trains in Siemens-equipped territories; this interoperability is critical since the R-211 fleet, which will operate on 8th Avenue, is being equipped by Thales, with wayside equipment provided by Siemens.

MTA has achieved the Program's goal of awarding prime construction contracts totaling $516M.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Completion of Building Management System/Fire Life Safety System (BMS/FLSS) IST Jun-22 Aug-22 2 Completion of Fire Alarm IST Nov-21 Apr-22 5 Completion of Tunnel (SCADA) IST (includes Tunnel Ventilation) Oct-21 Mar-22 5
